globalNews.title: Ukraine rescuers pull dead from rubble after Russian strikes kill 22 people
globalNews.summary: An eight-year-old boy killed in a strike on an apartment block are among the dead, officials say.

globalNews.title: Israel strikes southern Lebanon but partial truce with Hezbollah appears to hold
globalNews.summary: Israel continues its campaign in the south, though has not struck Beirut after a deal announced by the US.

globalNews.title: British couple lose Iran jail sentence appeal, family says
globalNews.summary: Lindsay and Craig Foreman were arrested in January 2025 during a global motorbike journey.

globalNews.title: Two people shot dead amid Kenya protests against US Ebola quarantine centre plan
globalNews.summary: The US plan has sparked public anger and led to demonstrations near the site of the proposed treatment facility.

globalNews.title: Canada formally requests renewal of North American free trade pact
globalNews.summary: In a letter to his North American counterparts, US-Canada Trade Minister Dominic LeBlanc said the three countries should renew the USMCA trade deal.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Zama accelerates compliance after court lifts $12.5M USDC freeze
cryptoNews.summary: Privacy protocol Zama says it will accelerate compliance measures after a court lifted a $12.5 million USDC freeze tied to an unrelated legal dispute.

cryptoNews.title: Georgia targets illegal crypto mining in Mestia crackdown: Report
cryptoNews.summary: Georgia will reportedly install electricity meters across Mestia to curb illegal crypto mining after officials blamed miners for grid strain and outages.

cryptoNews.title: Kaiko acquires Amberdata in blockchain data consolidation push
cryptoNews.summary: Kaiko acquired Amberdata to expand its institutional crypto data platform with derivatives analytics, onchain tools and AI-powered research.

cryptoNews.title: HIVE Bitcoin holdings drop by 331 BTC in Q1, reports record $298M revenue
cryptoNews.summary: HIVE reduced its Bitcoin holdings to 150 BTC while annual revenue climbed to $297.8 million, driven by growth in mining and AI computing.

aiNews.title: Trump signs narrower executive order on AI oversight after industry objections
aiNews.summary: After industry objections, President Trump signed a revised AI executive order requiring only voluntary prerelease government reviews of advanced models.

aiNews.title: OpenAI launches new Codex tools for white-collar work
aiNews.summary: OpenAI is getting serious about courting enterprise users. On Tuesday, the AI lab released a new set of capabilities for Codex, meant to expand the agentic tool’s uses in the workplace. Together with

aiNews.title: Anthropic scales Claude Mythos  to critical infrastructure in 15+ countries
aiNews.summary: Anthropic is expanding Project Glasswing, its security vulnerability program, and access to Mythos to 150 organizations across 15 countries — targeting critical infrastructure in power, water, healthc

aiNews.title: ZeroDrift raises $10M to protect AI models from themselves
aiNews.summary: A new AI compliance service sits between AI models and end users to flag and replace any messages that might present a compliance problem.

aiNews.title: Rocket engine startup Impulse raises $500 million to hire people, not AI
aiNews.summary: Engineering physical systems still depends on human talent, according to Impulse Space president Eric Romo.
